posts.title: Frontend Developer
posts.description: FlowPilot, a startup building team management software, is looking for a Frontend Developer to create Angular interfaces, integrate REST APIs, and improve the user experience.

posts.title: Backend Developer
posts.description: CloudNest is looking for a Backend Developer to build ASP.NET Core APIs, work with SQL databases, implement authentication, and maintain services for a SaaS platform for small businesses.

posts.title: Fullstack Developer
posts.description: GreenCart is building a platform that connects local food producers with customers. We are looking for a Fullstack Developer to work on an Angular frontend, a .NET or Node.js backend, and database integrations.

posts.title: Junior JavaScript Developer
posts.description: Launchly is looking for a Junior JavaScript Developer to help build an MVP platform for startups. The role includes creating interactive components, working with API requests, and maintaining frontend code.

posts.title: DevOps Engineer
posts.description: ScaleStack is looking for a DevOps Engineer to manage Docker containers, automate CI/CD pipelines, monitor applications, and maintain cloud infrastructure for a growing B2B SaaS product.

posts.title: C# .NET Developer
posts.description: FinTrack, a fintech startup focused on personal finance tools, is looking for a C# .NET Developer to build secure REST APIs, integrate external services, and work with SQL Server databases.

posts.title: TypeScript Frontend Developer
posts.description: MentorLoop is building a platform that connects mentors with junior developers. We are looking for a TypeScript Frontend Developer to create new Angular features and maintain clean, scalable frontend code.

posts.title: QA Automation Engineer
posts.description: TestForge is looking for a QA Automation Engineer to create automated tests, report bugs, and collaborate with frontend and backend developers before each new product release.

posts.title: React Developer
posts.description: EventSpark is building an event management and ticketing platform. We are looking for a React Developer to create dashboards, develop modern UI components, and connect the frontend with backend services.

posts.title: Product Designer
posts.description: Habitly is a startup focused on habit tracking and productivity. We are looking for a Product Designer to research user needs, create wireframes, and design clear screens for our web application.
